## Description

Closes #(issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Test expansion

## Testing

- [ ] All existing tests pass (`python -m pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] New tests added for changed code
- [ ] Manual pipeline run (`python main.py run_all`) completed

## Checklist

- [ ] Type hints added for all new functions
- [ ] Docstrings updated
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] No new warnings or linting errors
- [ ] Code coverage maintained or improved

## Additional Notes

Any migration steps, configuration changes, or deployment notes.
